/usr/bin/c++  -O3 -march=native -mtune=native -Wall -Wextra -O2 -g -DNDEBUG -fPIC -Wall -Wextra -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/fail_safe_verification.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/fail_safe_verification.dir/test_fail_safe_verification.cpp.o -o fail_safe_verification   -L/home/pi/Aurore/artifacts/tflite/lib  -L/home/pi/Aurore/artifacts/abseil/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/home/pi/Aurore/artifacts/tflite/lib:/home/pi/Aurore/artifacts/abseil/lib -lpthread
